title: Portfolio
description: A dynamic portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and experience with a clean design and responsive layout.

title: LifeLedger
description: An intelligent blood bank management and donor coordination platform designed to bridge the critical gap between blood donors, hospitals, and NGOs.

title: CyberSaathi
description: An intelligent web platform designed to help users understand, prevent, and respond to cybercrime. It combines AI-driven assistance, real-time guidance, community support, and legal awareness to provide practical solutions for cyber threats, especially for Indian users.

title: Smart Market Finder
description: Find nearby markets, compare prices, and surface the most efficient shopping route through a fast mobile-friendly interface.

title: PulseStack CRM
description: A lightweight sales dashboard for managing leads, activity history, and pipeline progress with reusable UI patterns and modular scripts.
